channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-23 to 2026-07-29
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 0 INTERESTING, 7 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Thu 2026-07-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.7 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 6 kt NW, water 68°F. Low tide: 09:01, 21:58. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.7 ft). Fri 2026-07-24: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 6 kt ENE, water 68°F. Low tide: 09:53, 22:48. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (ENE). Sat 2026-07-25: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt NE, water 69°F. Low tide: 10:42, 23:36. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NE). Sun 2026-07-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 3 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: 11:29. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (N). Mon 2026-07-27: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.4 sec, wind 3 kt NNE, water 70°F. Low tide: 00:21, 12:15. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.4 ft); wind direction off (NNE). Tue 2026-07-28: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.9 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 3 kt SSE, water 70°F. Low tide: 01:05, 13:01. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.9 ft); period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (SSE). Wed 2026-07-29: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.7 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 15 kt N, water 67°F. Low tide: 01:47, 13:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.7 ft); wind too strong (15 kt); wind direction off (N).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 0 INTERESTING, 7 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Thu 2026-07-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.7 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 6 kt NW, water 68°F. Low tide: 09:01, 21:58. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.7 ft).
  • Fri 2026-07-24: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 6 kt ENE, water 68°F. Low tide: 09:53, 22:48. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (ENE).
  • Sat 2026-07-25: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt NE, water 69°F. Low tide: 10:42, 23:36. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NE).
  • Sun 2026-07-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 3 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: 11:29. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (N).
  • Mon 2026-07-27: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.4 sec, wind 3 kt NNE, water 70°F. Low tide: 00:21, 12:15. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.4 ft); wind direction off (NNE).
  • Tue 2026-07-28: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.9 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 3 kt SSE, water 70°F. Low tide: 01:05, 13:01. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.9 ft); period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (SSE).
  • Wed 2026-07-29: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.7 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 15 kt N, water 67°F. Low tide: 01:47, 13:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.7 ft); wind too strong (15 kt); wind direction off (N).
